message:
feat(core): add cross-block-boundary write test, btrfs directory hard-link EPERM test, and format cleanup

- Add write_cross_block_boundary_preserves_data test verifying that a
  2KB write spanning the 4KB block boundary correctly patches the middle
  region while preserving the prefix and suffix — validates the
  multi-block write path end-to-end
- Add btrfs_write_link_directory_returns_eperm test verifying that
  hard-linking a directory returns EPERM (not IsDirectory), matching
  the POSIX requirement
- Format cleanup in btrfs write error handling: break long
  free_extent/write_all_at chains into multi-line for readability
- Fix trailing whitespace in readlink symlink guard
- Format cleanup in journal transaction and test assertions
- Sync beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
